hooks.command: [ "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" != "main" ] || { echo '{"block": true, "message": "Cannot edit files on main branch. Create a feature branch first: git checkout -b feat/<description>"}' >&2; exit 2; }

FILE_PATH=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .filepath // empty' 2>/dev/null)
if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ]; then
  echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.env|\.env\.|production\.config|secrets\.' && {
    echo '{"block": true, "message": "BLOCKED: Protected file. Do not edit .env, production configs, or secret files directly."}' >&2
    exit 2
  }
fi
exit 0

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]]; then
  npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null
  if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
    echo '{"feedback": "Formatted with Prettier.", "suppressOutput": true}'
  else
    echo '{"feedback": "Prettier formatting failed — check syntax."}' >&2
  fi
fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then
  output=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1)
  exit_code=$?
  if [ $exit_code -eq 0 ]; then
    echo '{"feedback": "TypeScript: no errors.", "suppressOutput": true}'
  else
    errors=$(echo "$output" | grep -A 2 "error TS" | head -20)
    echo "{\"feedback\": \"TypeScript errors found:\
$errors\"}" >&2
  fi
  exit 0
fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.test\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]]; then
  echo '{"feedback": "Running related tests..."}' >&2
  npx vitest run "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tail -25
  if [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -eq 0 ]; then
    echo '{"feedback": "Tests passed."}'
  else
    echo '{"feedback": "Tests failed — see output above."}' >&2
  fi
fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ package\.json$ ]]; then
  echo '{"feedback": "Installing dependencies..."}' >&2
  pnpm install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || npm install 2>/dev/null
  if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
    echo '{"feedback": "Dependencies installed.", "suppressOutput": true}'
  else
    echo '{"feedback": "Dependency install failed."}' >&2
  fi
fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ (components|pages|app)/.*\.(tsx|jsx|css)$ ]]; then
  if command -v screencapture &>/dev/null; then
    mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/.claude/screenshots"
    screencapture -x -T 1 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/.claude/screenshots/ui-$(date +%s).png" 2>/dev/null
    echo '{"feedback": "UI screenshot captured.", "suppressOutput": true}'
  fi
fi

if command -v osascript &>/dev/null; then
  osascript -e 'display notification "Claude finished the task" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"' 2>/dev/null
fi

if command -v npm &>/dev/null && [ -f package.json ]; then
  BUILD_OUTPUT=$(npm run build 2>&1)
  if [ $? -eq 0 ] && command -v vercel &>/dev/null; then
    PREVIEW_URL=$(vercel --prod=false --yes 2>/dev/null | tail -1)
    if [ -n "$PREVIEW_URL" ]; then
      echo "{\"feedback\": \"Vercel preview deployed: $PREVIEW_URL\"}"
      command -v open &>/dev/null && open "$PREVIEW_URL"
    fi
  fi
fi
